name: Cash Munny Pawn
description_short: Cash Munny Pawn is a pawn shop located in Chiefland, FL offering collateral-based loans and goods sales typical of the pawn industry.
description_long: Cash Munny Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop based in Chiefland, Florida, serving the local community with collateral-based financial services. The business is listed in the pawn-shops category and maintains a physical storefront at 1821 N Young Boulevard in Chiefland, FL 32626. Like standard pawn operations, the company facilitates loans secured by personal items and merchandise sales. The business is reachable at (352) 493-4485 for inquiries and transactions. Cash Munny Pawn's presence on the Locally directory indicates it operates as a local retail establishment rather than a large corporate chain. The shop currently shows no customer reviews on the platform, suggesting either recent listing or limited online visibility. Without detailed content about specific services, loan terms, interest rates, or operational policies available on the website, the full scope of their offerings remains limited in available documentation. The business operates with standard pawn shop hours that vary by day, with the current status showing as closed at the time of profile review.
pros: Local physical storefront in Chiefland, FL providing in-person service
Direct phone contact available at (352) 493-4485 for customer inquiries
Listed on Locally directory for local community visibility
Operates as established pawn shop serving local customer base
Accessible address at 1821 N Young Boulevard for walk-in customers
cons: Website provides minimal details about loan terms, interest rates, or fees
No information available about collateral acceptance policies or item valuation methods
Zero customer reviews on Locally platform limits credibility assessment
Limited online presence with no detailed service descriptions or policies
No information about loan duration, repayment terms, or redemption processes
best_for: Local Chiefland, FL residents needing quick collateral-based loans
Individuals with items to sell or pawn for immediate cash
Customers preferring face-to-face transactions over online lending
diagnosis: Cash Munny Pawn is best for local Chiefland residents needing quick cash through collateral-based loans or looking to sell items. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent information about loan terms, rates, and policies—potential customers should call directly at (352) 493-4485 to discuss specific terms before pledging items.
services: Gold and jewelry services (typical for pawn shops)
